description: Repository-native implementation of the FOI-O V2 empirical-governance overlay.
design_provenance: edithatogo/rac-conformance conformance, triangulation, fixture-independence, and publication-handoff patterns

gates.condition: Populate an authentic content-bearing archive corpus only after item-level rights, exclusions, attribution, storage, and permitted-use boundaries are recorded and approved; metadata-only source-pack promotion is insufficient.
gates.note: The approval is metadata-only; source-content redistribution and publication remain unauthorized.

gates.condition: Verify correspondence and attachment evidence across the archive before making an archive-wide raw-state mapping claim; the two approved request-level mappings remain bounded to requests 11872 and 35076.
gates.note: The approvals apply only to requests 11872 and 35076.

gates.condition: Freeze an authentic sample with immutable unit, source, cluster, split, stratum, inclusion-probability, weight, accessibility, and rights provenance after the authentic population and archive-wide evidence gates pass.
gates.note: The exact stderr review classified all three lines in each identical file as error signals without emitting verbatim content. The pdftotext retry remains blocked. The independent MuPDF method design is approved, and its hardened wrapper and inert exact execution request are committed. PDF processing, derived-content creation, context presentation, analyst execution, reconciliation, and empirical claims remain prohibited pending exact approval of the request, a separately committed final authorization, and successful clean-HEAD verification.

gates.condition: Obtain and execute an exact contract naming two independent analysts and a distinct reconciler, with actor-class and runtime provenance. Automated agents may fill these roles. Their authentic, verified outputs may support bounded empirical claims but remain non-human-reviewed and non-gold unless separately approved.
gates.note: The v0.2 analyst protocol design is exactly approved. Sample membership, runtime assignment, context presentation, analysis, and reconciliation remain unauthorized.

gates.condition: Run the registered comparison and reliability evaluation over an authentic frozen sample with two independent locked analysis sets and distinct reconciliation. Limit claims to the sampled design; fixture-only inter-agent diagnostics do not satisfy this gate.
gates.note: Fixture diagnostics SHA-256 fe2f9e29136fca68894bc3960b7a5cfcc4f97edc3e0a970d94b7fbc2a783bbc is synthetic and non-empirical.

gates.condition: After authentic empirical verification passes, obtain a separate exact human approval for any reviewed or gold-label promotion; fixture approvals and diagnostics authorization do not permit promotion.
gates.note: The historical approval covers independent rule fixtures only.

gates.condition: Generate, freeze, and publish the versioned immutable release-evidence bundle only after authentic empirical comparison, independent analysis and reconciliation, reliability evaluation, promotion approval, and explicit external-delivery authorization are complete.
Trigger no RaC Conformance paper-update workflow until the immutable release-evidence bundle exists and is published; the earlier arXiv record does not satisfy this prerequisite.
gates.note: arXiv:2607.02947 is the earlier methods manuscript and is not V2 release evidence.

gates.condition: Obtain explicit human authorization before any pull request, dataset publication, software release, paper update, or preprint submission; GitHub-issue authorization does not extend to these actions.
